explanation: Mệnh đề quan hệ mang nghĩa bị động trong quá khứ (was arrested). Động từ chính của câu chia ở hiện tại đơn (is my neighbor).
options: The man who was arrested by the police yesterday was my neighbor.
The man who was arrested by the police yesterday is my neighbor.
The man who arrested by the police yesterday is my neighbor.
The man whom was arrested by the police yesterday is my neighbor.
question: The man / who / arrest / police / yesterday / be / my neighbor.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc since: Hiện tại hoàn thành (hoặc HTHT tiếp diễn) + since + Quá khứ đơn (since we arrived).
options: It has rained heavily since we arrive here.
It is raining heavily since we arrived here.
It rained heavily since we arrive here.
It has been raining heavily since we arrived here.
question: It / rain / heavily / since / we / arrive / here.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Có 'last year' -> Tình huống trái với quá khứ nên phải dùng câu điều kiện loại 3 (If + S + had V3/ed, S + would have V3/ed).
options: If he studied harder last year, he would pass the entrance exam.
If he had studied harder last year, he would have passed the entrance exam.
If he had studied harder last year, he would pass the entrance exam.
If he studies harder last year, he will pass the entrance exam.
question: If / he / study / harder / last year, / he / pass / entrance exam.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: apologize to somebody for V-ing (xin lỗi ai vì việc gì). Cụm từ: be late for school (trễ học).
options: She apologized to the teacher for to be late for school.
She apologized to the teacher for be late for school.
She apologized to the teacher for being late for school.
She apologized the teacher for being late for school.
question: She / apologize / teacher / for / be / late / school.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: advise sb to do sth (khuyên ai làm gì) và stop V-ing (dừng hẳn việc đang làm).
options: The doctor advised him to stop smoking immediately.
The doctor advised him to stop to smoke immediately.
The doctor advised him stop to smoke immediately.
The doctor advised him stopping smoking immediately.
question: The doctor / advise / him / stop / smoke / immediately.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Thể truyền khiến (Causative form) bị động: have something done (have my car repaired). Có 'tomorrow' nên dùng thì tương lai.
options: I will have my car repair by the mechanic tomorrow.
I will have my car to be repaired by the mechanic tomorrow.
I will have my car repaired by the mechanic tomorrow.
I have my car repaired by the mechanic tomorrow.
question: I / have / my car / repair / by / mechanic / tomorrow.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: so + adj + that + mệnh đề (quá... đến nỗi mà). Động từ 'decide to V' phải lùi về quá khứ cho phù hợp với 'was'.
options: The weather was so bad that we decide to stay at home.
The weather was so bad that we decided to stay at home.
The weather is so bad that we decide stay at home.
The weather is so bad that we decided to stay at home.
question: The weather / be / so / bad / that / we / decide / stay / home.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc nhượng bộ: Despite + V-ing/Noun phrase. 'manage to V' (xoay xở làm được việc gì).
options: Despite of being exhausted, she managed to finish the report.
Despite being exhausted, she managed to finish the report.
Despite she was exhausted, she managed to finish the report.
Despite be exhausted, she managed to finish the report.
question: Despite / be / exhausted, / she / manage / finish / report.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc so sánh kép (Càng... càng): The + so sánh hơn + S + V, The + so sánh hơn + S + V.
options: The hard you practice, the good you will become.
The harder you practice, the better you will become.
The more hard you practice, the more good you become.
The harder you practice, the best you will become.
question: The / hard / you / practice, / the / good / you / become.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Có 'last month' -> Câu ước trái với quá khứ (S + wish + S + had + V3/ed).
options: I wish I would not buy that expensive car last month.
I wish I did not buy that expensive car last month.
I wish I had not bought that expensive car last month.
I wish I have not bought that expensive car last month.
question: I / wish / I / not / buy / that / expensive / car / last / month.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Đảo ngữ với 'Never before': Đưa trợ động từ lên trước chủ ngữ. 'before' đi kèm thì hiện tại hoàn thành (have I seen).
options: Never before I saw such a beautiful sunset.
Never before have I seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never before I have seen such a beautiful sunset.
Never before did I see such a beautiful sunset.
question: Never / before / I / see / such / beautiful / sunset.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc used to + V (thói quen trong quá khứ). Vế sau có 'two years ago' nên động từ 'give' chia quá khứ là 'gave'.
options: My father used to smoke a lot, but he gave it up two years ago.
My father used to smoke a lot, but he give it up two years ago.
My father used to smoking a lot, but he gave it up two years ago.
My father is used to smoking a lot, but he gave it up two years ago.
question: My father / use / smoke / a lot, / but / he / give / up / two years / ago.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc khuyên bảo: suggest that + S + (should) + V(nguyên mẫu). Chú ý mạo từ 'the' trước 'environment'.
options: Our teacher suggested us to protect the environment.
Our teacher suggested that we should protect the environment.
Our teacher suggested that we to protect the environment.
Our teacher suggested that we protecting the environment.
question: Our teacher / suggest / we / should / protect / environment.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'By the time' trong quá khứ: By the time + quá khứ đơn, quá khứ hoàn thành (hành động rời đi xảy ra trước khi đến).
options: By the time you had arrived at the party yesterday, everyone left.
By the time you arrived at the party yesterday, everyone left.
By the time you arrive at the party yesterday, everyone has left.
By the time you arrived at the party yesterday, everyone had left.
question: By the time / you / arrive / party / yesterday, / everyone / leave.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Dấu hiệu 'for a long time' (trong một thời gian dài) yêu cầu sử dụng thì hiện tại hoàn thành (haven't met).
options: They haven't met each other since a long time.
They didn't meet each other for a long time.
They haven't met each other for a long time.
They hadn't meet each other for a long time.
question: They / not / meet / each other / for / long / time.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Câu bị động có 2 tân ngữ ở thì quá khứ đơn: S + was/were + given + to + somebody.
options: A new laptop is given to him on his birthday.
A new laptop was given him on his birthday.
A new laptop was given to him on his birthday.
A new laptop gave to him on his birthday.
question: A / new / laptop / give / him / on / his / birthday.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc sở thích: prefer V-ing to V-ing (thích làm việc này hơn việc kia).
options: She prefers read books to watch television.
She prefers reading books to watching television.
She prefers reading books than watching television.
She prefers to read books to watch television.
question: She / prefer / read / books / watch / television.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Có 'every day' (hiện tại đơn). Cấu trúc: It takes + somebody + time + to V.
options: It takes me two hours to commute to work every day.
It took me two hours to commute to work every day.
It takes me two hours commuting to work every day.
It takes me two hours commute to work every day.
question: It / take / me / two hours / commute / work / every day.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: It is + adj + for somebody + to V (Thật cần thiết cho ai đó để làm gì).
options: It is necessary of students to wear uniforms at school.
It is necessary for students to wear uniforms at school.
It is necessary for students wear uniforms at school.
It is necessary that students wearing uniforms at school.
question: It / be / necessary / students / wear / uniforms / school.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Rút gọn mệnh đề quan hệ dạng chủ động bằng cách sử dụng Hiện tại phân từ (V-ing: standing).
options: The girl stood next to the window is my sister.
The girl who standing next to the window is my sister.
The girl standing next to the window is my sister.
The girl stands next to the window is my sister.
question: The / girl / stand / next / the window / be / my sister.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Câu điều kiện loại 2 (lời khuyên): If I were you, S + would + V. Động từ to-be chia là 'were' cho mọi ngôi.
options: If I were you, I would not accept that job offer.
If I was you, I will not accept that job offer.
If I had been you, I would not accept that job offer.
If I am you, I will not accept that job offer.
question: If / I / be / you, / I / not / accept / that / job / offer.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra trong quá khứ (Quá khứ tiếp diễn - were having) thì hành động khác xen vào (Quá khứ đơn - went out).
options: While we had dinner, the power was going out.
While we are having dinner, the power goes out.
While we were having dinner, the power went out.
While we have had dinner, the power went out.
question: While / we / have / dinner, / the / power / go / out.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc bị động của 'need' với vật: S(vật) + need + V-ing (hoặc to be V3/ed). Chú ý 'needs' phải thêm 's'.
options: Your room is dirty. It needs to clean right away.
Your room is dirty. It need cleaning right away.
Your room is dirty. It needs cleaned right away.
Your room is dirty. It needs cleaning right away.
question: Your / room / be / dirty. It / need / clean / right away.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: make + somebody + adj (làm cho ai cảm thấy thế nào). Cảm xúc của con người dùng tính từ đuôi -ed (surprised).
options: The news made everyone in the room surprising.
The news made everyone in the room surprise.
The news made everyone in the room surprised.
The news made everyone in the room to surprise.
question: The / news / make / everyone / in / room / surprise.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Câu hỏi đuôi của cấu trúc rủ rê 'Let's + V' luôn luôn là 'shall we?'.
options: Let's go out for dinner tonight, do we?
Let's go out for dinner tonight, shall we?
Let's go out for dinner tonight, don't we?
Let's go out for dinner tonight, will we?
question: Let's / go / out / for / dinner / tonight, / we?
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc phối hợp thì: Before + Quá khứ đơn (went), Quá khứ hoàn thành (had done).
options: Before she goes to bed, she had done all her homework.
Before she went to bed, she had done all her homework.
Before she had gone to bed, she did all her homework.
Before she went to bed, she did all her homework.
question: Before / she / go / to / bed, / she / do / all / homework.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Đảo ngữ với 'Only after': Only after + Mệnh đề 1 (có thể ở QKHT), Mệnh đề 2 (Đảo ngữ ở thì QKĐ: did + S + V).
options: Only after had he apologized she forgave him.
Only after he had apologized did she forgive him.
Only after he apologized she forgave him.
Only after he had apologized she did forgive him.
question: Only / after / he / apologize, / she / forgive / him.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc 'would rather' với 2 chủ ngữ khác nhau diễn tả ý muốn ở hiện tại/tương lai: S1 + would rather + S2 + V(quá khứ đơn).
options: I would rather you didn't tell anyone about this secret.
I would rather you not tell anyone about this secret.
I would rather you won't tell anyone about this secret.
I would rather you hadn't tell anyone about this secret.
question: I / would rather / you / not / tell / anyone / about / this / secret.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: S + V + such + a/an + adj + Noun + that + mệnh đề. Chữ 'interesting' bắt đầu bằng nguyên âm nên dùng mạo từ 'an'.
options: It was such interesting a book that I read it twice.
It was such an interesting book that I read it twice.
It was such an interesting book that I read twice.
It was so an interesting book that I read it twice.
question: It / be / such / interesting / book / that / I / read / it / twice.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc tương hỗ 'not only... but also' đi với 2 động từ thì hiện tại đơn. Cần mạo từ 'the' trước nhạc cụ (the piano).
options: He speaks not only English fluently but also play the piano well.
He not only speaks English fluently but also plays piano well.
He not only speak English fluently but also play the piano well.
He not only speaks English fluently but also plays the piano well.
question: He / not only / speak / English / fluently / but also / play / piano / well.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Đảo ngữ: No sooner + had + S + V3/ed + than + S + V2/ed (Vừa mới... thì đã...).
options: No sooner did he arrive home than the phone had rung.
No sooner had he arrived home when the phone rang.
No sooner he had arrived home than the phone rang.
No sooner had he arrived home than the phone rang.
question: No sooner / he / arrive / home / than / phone / ring.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: have difficulty + (in) + V-ing (Gặp khó khăn trong việc làm gì).
options: Many students have difficulties to learn phrasal verbs.
Many students have difficulty learning phrasal verbs.
Many students have difficult learning phrasal verbs.
Many students have difficulty to learn phrasal verbs.
question: Many / students / have / difficulty / learn / phrasal verbs.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: look forward to + V-ing (Mong đợi, trông ngóng điều gì đó).
options: We look forward to hear from you soon.
We are looking forward hearing from you soon.
We are looking forward to hearing from you soon.
We look forward hearing from you soon.
question: We / look / forward / hear / from / you / soon.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: be used to + V-ing (Đã quen với việc gì ở hiện tại).
options: After living in the UK for a year, I am used to drive on the left.
After living in the UK for a year, I am used to driving on the left.
After living in the UK for a year, I used to drive on the left.
After live in the UK for a year, I am used to driving on the left.
question: After / live / in / UK / for / a / year, / I / be / used / drive / on / the left.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc xin phép lịch sự: Would you mind if I + V(quá khứ đơn)?
options: Would you mind if I borrow your dictionary?
Would you mind me borrow your dictionary?
Would you mind if I borrowed your dictionary?
Would you mind if I borrowing your dictionary?
question: Would / you / mind / if / I / borrow / your / dictionary?
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.

explanation: Cấu trúc: spend + time/money + V-ing. Chủ ngữ 'She' nên động từ 'spend' phải thêm 's' (spends).
options: She spends a lot of money buying clothes every month.
She spend a lot of money buying clothes every month.
She spends a lot of money to buy clothes every month.
She spends a lot of money buy clothes every month.
question: She / spend / a lot of / money / buy / clothes / every / month.
instruction: Use the words/ phrases provided to make meaningful sentences.
